reasoning: Provide a concise summary of the prevention guidance given in the input, emphasizing type 2 prevention, note that type 1 cannot currently be prevented, and keep the wording aligned with the source.
output: Prevention: Keeping an ideal body weight and an active lifestyle may prevent or delay the start of type 2 diabetes. If you're overweight, losing just 5% of your body weight can reduce your risk. Some medicines can also be used to delay or prevent the start of type 2 diabetes. At this time, type 1 diabetes cannot be prevented. But there is promising research that shows type 1 diabetes may be delayed in some high risk people.
